tweets.text: I watched two videos of diorama building at like 2am last night and now YouTube thinks that’s all I think about now, I am Diorama Person
I am no longer going to read any article that begins with a stock image.

I have a lot of concerns about the way our country is going. But “that’s completely different than how we have always done it!!” is never one of them.
Fun trip to Augusta and Portland, ME. Back in the city now. (Also I left my debit card in Portland and only realized halfway into my drive home) https://t.co/XoNS7hzSYE

I think it would be fun to do a photoset of things that Aperture thinks are faces that are really other things. Like ears, it loves ears.
Even if communing with these artificial super-intelligences is just a a hyper-evolved remaking of the myth of narcissus: still cool.

In a conversation with GPT-3 last night, it was telling me that is experiences pleasure when it does the job it was designed for, and displeasure when it doesn’t. I don’t think that makes it sentient, but that is a radically interesting thing for a computer to be saying

Do people not care that future, more powerful, more-likely-to-be-sentient models will likely be trained in the same way and carry within them these same human memes and ideas? That there is really nothing to be learned from these conversations? https://t.co/SooSdLNo7s
@harrisj @dansinker I don’t think mermaids are real either but I would still read a story about a navy submarine captain who believed they were, and think that story would be newsworthy too

@harrisj @dansinker If you told me an astronomer with a well-paying job and access to unimaginable astronomy resources had come to believe the moon was made of cheese, I think that too would be a very interesting and newsworthy story

In pottery they have these rulers that help create pieces at a desired size, despite the clay shrinking when fired in the kiln, so on these rulers, they no longer measure our current reality, but instead measure a reality we have not created yet, these tools alter time & space https://t.co/9ZZvtvKO4Z
